Describe the sequence of events during the sledding scene, including any text overlays.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a dark figure rides a sled down a winding concrete track with wooden sides; at 4s, a second person is visible sliding further up the track; at 6s, green 3D text reading 'Was it Warm?' appears over the sliding figure before the scene ends.

question: Describe the gathering scene, noting the location text and foreground objects.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a group of people wearing dark winter clothing gathers on a snow-covered hill near bare trees; at 14s, red text reading 'Muskegon Sports Center' is visible at the bottom center; at 16s, snow-covered benches are seen in the foreground before the scene transitions.
